title: T-065 — Docs: TEC-025 BOM Snapshots Viewer prototype gap brief
prompt:
# T-065 — Docs: TEC-025 BOM Snapshots Viewer prototype gap brief

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §7.5 TEC-025, §4A TEC-025
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Brief documenting the snapshots viewer UX contract for future prototype work.

Cover: list filterable by WO + immutability badge; diff modal between snapshot and current BOM; rule: never allow edit. Reuse the diff renderer from T-040.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- design/specs/TEC-025-bom-snapshots-viewer.md [create]

## Out of scope
- Prototype JSX
- Implementation

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the brief, when reviewed, then it specifies list filters, immutability rules, and diff-modal contract.
2. Given the brief, when read by a designer, then they can produce a labelled prototype that matches the contract.

## Test strategy
- Manual review by UX team.
- No automated tests for docs.

## Risk red lines
- Do not propose any edit affordance for snapshots.
- Do not claim the screen is blocked by missing prototype; implementation is covered by the paired spec-driven UI task.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
